title: [MTR3/4] Sydney metro & Sydney Trains
description: This resource pack adds Sydney Metro and Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![a & b set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7388a6b909c861b6fcf82ede1014d941dee2054.png)

## Introduction

This resource pack adds Sydney Metro and Trains in Australia.

The latest version (260131) allows free movement on the first and second floors of the train and working passenger information display. Compatible with the latest version of MTR4.

## Terms & Disclaimer

This RP can be applied manually in the 'Resource Packs' page in the same way that other RPs are applied after Installing Required Mods and Addons.

Before using, please set the JVM arguments to 6GB or higher. It may take some time to load this RP.

MTR3 and MTR4 use different versions, and for MTR3, it is recommended to make appropriate number of the cars wrote below. (MTR4's formation isn't affected)

for more information, check readme inside the pack.

## Contents

* Sydney Trains A Set
* Sydney Trains B Set
* Sydney Trains M Set
* Sydney Trains T Set
* Sydney Trains K Set
* City Rail G Set
* Sydney Metro Alstom Metropolis Stock
